configured.de: Weither not your server has been configured or not.

spawnable.de: All channels that can have snakes spawn and/or slither.

frequency.de: The amount of snakes that can spawn within 24 hours.

enabled.de: Weither not Snakes will slither to other spawnable channels after it spawns.

speed.de: How many minutes will have to pass before Snakes will slither again.

amount.de: Approximately how many times a snake can slither before it goes away.
